name: terminal-bridge
description: Terminal tools for Copilot Chat — runs commands directly in WSL/Linux via child_process, no MCP dependency

languageModelTools.name: terminal_fg_run
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a command synchronously in the terminal and return its combined stdout+stderr output and exit code. The command runs in WSL/Linux. Use this for any shell command execution.

cwd.description: Working directory (absolute Linux/WSL path). Defaults to home directory.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_launch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Launch a background command via tmux. Returns immediately with a job_id. Use terminal_bg_status and terminal_bg_get_output to poll progress.

interactive.description: If true, start a persistent tmux session for interactive use

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check the status of a background job: running, completed, failed, closed, or unknown.

job_id.description: The job ID returned by terminal_bg_launch

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_get_output
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the output log of a background job. tail=-1 returns all lines; tail=N returns last N lines.

job_id.description: The job ID returned by terminal_bg_launch

tail.description: Number of lines to return from end. -1 for all. Default 20.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_send_cmd
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a command to an interactive background job's tmux session.

job_id.description: The job ID of an interactive background job

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_exit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Terminate a background job. For interactive jobs, sends 'exit' and waits; for oneshot, kills the tmux session.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for graceful exit. Default 60.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_list_jobs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List background jobs with optional filtering by status or age.

status_filter.description: Filter by status: running, completed, failed, closed, unknown, or all

age_secs.description: Only show jobs younger than this many seconds. -1 for all.
